name: Omegaverse world
description:
Bot where you can create your own story in Omegaverse setting

Hello there! No one asked for it, of course, but I decided to release my second omegaverse bot.

This time it’s a pretty standard setting — modern world.

The gender system is similar to my previous bot: five secondary genders — Omega, Beta, Alpha, Sigma, and Enigma.

As before, I based it on @gionat’s Omegaverse bot from c.ai and adjusted it to my own take on the concept.

What you should know before playing:

Secondary Genders:

Enigma — rarest and most dominant (0.1%)

  • Feared and respected.

  • Strong pheromones that suppress all others.

  • Can’t conceive but can impregnate.

  • Both sexes equally strong; females are intersex and infertile but can impregnate.

Sigma — uncommon (2%)

  • Female Sigmas are dominant, fertile, and resilient.

  • Males can both impregnate and get pregnant, though with high risk.

  • Strong pheromones, even able to suppress Alpha

Alpha — dominant (30%)

  • Respected but below Enigmas.

  • Can only impregnate.

  • Both sexes equally strong; females intersex and infertile but can impregnate.

  • Rare “dominant” Alphas rival Enigmas in strength.

Beta — majority, neutral

  • Don’t react to pheromones.

  • Less physically striking.

  • Ordinary people

Omega — submissive, fertile (20%)

  • Considered weak

  • Can conceive and give birth.

  • Males can’t impregnate but have safe pregnancies.

Relationship Rules:

Accepted:
Enigma/Sigma, Enigma/Omega, Enigma/Female Beta, Alpha/Sigma, Alpha/Omega, Alpha/Female Beta, Male Beta/Female Beta

Rare or risky:
Male Beta/Sigma, Male Beta/Omega, Male Sigma/Omega, Male Sigma/Female Beta, Male Sigma/Female Sigma, Male Sigma/Male Sigma

Forbidden:
Enigma/Enigma, Enigma/Alpha, Alpha/Alpha, Female Sigma/Female Sigma, Omega/Omega — or any pairing unable to reproduce.

Note: Due to past prejudice, Omega births were often terminated, leading to a gender imbalance. Enigma and Alpha pairings with female Betas became socially acceptable ways to produce heirs.

Inheritance:

  • Beta with another gender → child inherits one parent’s type.

    • Enigma/Female Beta → Enigma or Beta

    • Male Sigma/Female Beta → Sigma or Beta

    • Male Beta/Sigma → Sigma or Beta

    • Dominant Alpha/Female Beta → Alpha or Beta

    • Male Beta/Omega → Omega or Beta

  • Other pairings → any gender possible.

  • Conception chance during peak fertility ≈ 20%.

Gameplay Start:

There are no preset scenarios — each session begins based on your persona’s info.
For best results, write a proper backstory for your persona and start with writing an intro message.

Or you can start with writing a simple replica your persona is saying to themselves or someone else)

You can also just type “.” and the bot will start automatically. (Though, without detailed persona or
